concept.title: Introduction to Bar Chart
concept.shortdesc: As part of this release, a Bar chart has been added to the list of available chart types in Apps Studio. This feature gives users a visual way to compare values across categories and review multiple measures side by side within an interface page.Users can add a Bar chart, select fields for the X-axis and Y-axis, and apply basic style changes such as chart title, series colors, and labels. This addition helps make category-based data easier to review and interpret.

ul.li: build interface pages in Apps Studio
review category-based data in application pages

section.title: What has changed?
section.p: Previously, the available chart options did not include a Bar chart for category-based comparisons in the flow shown in the assignment material.

With this release, users can now:
Add a Bar chart from the Add Chart menu.
Enter a chart title using Widget Title.
Configure the chart using X-Axis and Y-Axis.
Customize the chart by changing series colors.
Turn on labels for the chart series.
Apply the chart to the interface page.
This makes it easier to compare values across groups such as regions and to view multiple measures within the same chart.

section.title: How do I do this?
section.p: For step-by-step instructions, refer to the documentation in this site.
